revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-155

Drift (in Decca)

A slow change of reading on the Decometer due to random changes of phase produced in the Decca receiving equipment, which change can be corrected by a method of referencing.

{{IALAFooter}}
